_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED FOR PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTDL_v2
name: DeathMatch
author: ice@primalheaven.com
description: Legacy The Isle deathmatch dedicated server (Steam app 1020410, non-Evrima). No Steam beta branch.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Legacy Isle (1020410) - no Evrima beta
if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "steam user is not set.\n"
    echo -e "Using anonymous user.\n"
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

SRCDS_APPID=${SRCDS_APPID:-1020410}
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} validate +quit

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so 2>/dev/null || true
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so 2>/dev/null || true

mkdir -p /mnt/server/TheIsle/Saved/Config/LinuxServer
echo "Legacy Isle install complete"

variables.name: Steam App ID
variables.description: Legacy The Isle dedicated server (do not use Evrima beta)

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Run SteamCMD update on each server start (1=yes, 0=no)

variables.name: Steam User
variables.description: Steam username for SteamCMD (anonymous for dedicated server)
